name: pod-monitor
description: PreToolUse(Bash) advisory hook that fires when a Bash command launches a GPU pod (`hexa cloud nohup` / `hexa cloud fire` / `hexa cloud run`). Emits non-blocking additionalContext reminding the agent of commons @D g57 — 🛰️ Monitor tool attached to the streaming log AND `SAVE_POD=1` envar set AND ⏱ walltime estimated upfront with pod-hours headroom. Closes the R8a-LOST class (pod terminated mid-run before result.json reached the operator). Implemented in hexa-lang (`_pod_monitor.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). 0.1.3 — `_has_pod_fire` now uses token-position match past env-var prefix (the cloud verb must SIT at command position, not be a substring of the cmd) so commit messages / grep patterns / docs that merely mention the phrase no longer trigger noise. `fire` verb (hexa-lang PR #1309) added to the match set.
